steps.title: Identify the structural rule
steps.content: The text around the blank reveals a grammatical structure where a colon is needed to introduce an elaboration ('of keen interest to ...').

steps.title: Apply the signal to the choices
steps.content:
C captures the correct usage of a comma and no additional punctuation between noun and appositive. A, B, and D either add incorrect punctuation or omit necessary commas, violating standard English conventions.
That matches choice C — C is correct.
